sourceText: With unwavering resolve and exceptional military command, she suppressed rebellions, fought against Rome, expanded the Palmyrene Empire, and rose as a powerful force in the East.
translatedText: Tare da yunƙuri maras ƙarfi da umarnin soja na musamman, ta murkushe tawaye, ta yi yaƙi da Roma, ta faɗaɗa daular Palmyrene, kuma ta tashi a matsayin ƙarfi mai ƙarfi a Gabas.

sourceText: I am no mere queen ruling a subject of Rome, but the mother of Rome itself.
translatedText: Ni ba sarauniya ce kaɗai ke mulkin wani batu na Roma ba, amma uwar Roma kanta.

sourceText: This expresses a strong will to forge one's own destiny and refuse to yield to circumstances.
translatedText: Wannan yana bayyana ƙaƙƙarfan nufin mutum ya ƙirƙira kaddara da ƙin yarda da yanayi.

sourceText: The wise do not lose courage even in the face of death.
translatedText: Masu hikima ba sa yin ƙarfin hali ko da a lokacin mutuwa.

sourceText: This emphasizes that maintaining composure and courage amidst any hardship is a wise attitude.
translatedText: Wannan yana jaddada cewa kiyaye natsuwa da ƙarfin hali a cikin kowane wahala hali ne na hikima.

sourceText: The spirit of Palmyra is stronger than the legions of Rome.
translatedText: Ruhun Palmyra ya fi rundunonin Roma ƙarfi.

sourceText: This highlights the importance of national pride and united will that transcends physical strength.
translatedText: Wannan yana nuna mahimmancin girman kan ƙasa da haɗin kai wanda ya wuce ƙarfin jiki.

sourceText: He had to contend with the prevailing scientific dogma of species fixity, presenting evidence for extinction, and undertook the immense task of collecting and meticulously organizing vast quantities of anatomical specimens.
translatedText: Dole ne ya yi gwagwarmaya da akidar kimiyya da ta mamaye na kayyade nau'in jinsin halittu, da gabatar da shaidun kawar da su, kuma ya gudanar da gagarumin aiki na tattarawa da kuma tsara ɗimbin samfuran halittu.

sourceText: Through rigorous study of fossil records and detailed comparative anatomical analysis, he proved extinction and established the principle of 'correlation of forms,' revolutionizing animal classification.
translatedText: Ta hanyar tsauraran bincike na bayanan burbushin halittu da cikakken kwatankwacin nazarin jikin mutum, ya tabbatar da bacewa kuma ya kafa ka'idar 'daidaituwar sifofin,' juyin juya halin rarrabuwar dabbobi.

sourceText: Nature is always the most excellent teacher.
translatedText: Yanayin koyaushe shine mafi kyawun malami.

sourceText: Emphasizes that direct observation and study of natural phenomena and the structures of living beings are the most reliable ways to gain profound knowledge.
translatedText: Yana jaddada cewa lura kai tsaye da nazarin abubuwan da suka faru na halitta da kuma tsarin halittu sune mafi amintattun hanyoyin samun ilimi mai zurfi.

sourceText: Every part of an organism is intimately connected to its way of life.
translatedText: Kowane bangare na kwayoyin halitta yana da alaƙa da tsarin rayuwarsa.

sourceText: Indicates the importance of understanding how an animal's anatomical features adapt and function within its environment and survival strategy.
translatedText: Yana nuna mahimmancin fahimtar yadda fasalin halittar dabba ke daidaitawa da aiki a cikin muhallinta da dabarun rayuwa.
